title: A Chart of the China Sea from the Island of Sanciam to Pedrabranca
notes: Strong alternate NLA copy of the Huddart/Larkins China Sea chart; Lantao/Lantau appears in the Pearl River/Hong Kong area.

title: A Chart Of The China Sea... River Tigris from Canton to Macao

title: Chart of coast of China between Macau and Hong Kong
notes: Manuscript/early chart between Macau and Hong Kong; useful for Lantau/Lantao estuary context.

title: Xin’an Xian quan tu / 新安縣全圖
notes: Original NLA 5000px image of the Volonteri San-On District map, replacing the lower-res Commons copy for archival use.

title: Map of the colony of Hong Kong
